data.text:
Committed. Summary of changes against each AC:

- **AC 1 — Tab labeled 'Agent availability'**: NavShell `Providers` link text → `Agent availability`; page `<title>` and `<h1>` updated to match.
- **AC 2 — Per-provider model list visible**: New "Models" column with expand toggle; on expand, fetches `providerModels(name, kind)` and renders the model id list (with optional context length, available/unavailable styling). When `> 10` models, list is truncated and a "View all N models →" drilldown link to the existing per-provider detail page is shown.
- **AC 3 — Refresh button calls refreshProviderModels mutation**: Per-row `↻` button invokes the `refreshProviderModels` mutation and replaces the cached snapshot in place (also auto-expands the row).
- **AC 4 — Coordinated with NavShell ownership**: Edit landed in `NavShell.svelte` (the nav-owner component) rather than duplicating label state in the page.

Tests: `bun run check` passes with 0 errors. Updated `providers.spec.ts` heading assertion. The unrelated `D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts` failure is pre-existing and untouched.
